reviews.comment:
Es increíble que por una “avivada” haya bajado tanto la calidad de este YPF. La atención en playa y Full son buenas. Pero andá a buscar lugar para estacionar! Es tan raro! Hay más autos que gente siempre… no importa la hora, 8am y el full vacío y no hay lugar para estacionar. Alto curro se deben estar haciendo los pibes con los nuevos estacionamientos. Lamentable!

(Translated by Google)
It's unbelievable that this YPF station has suffered such a drop in quality because of a "shady deal." The service at the pumps and the full station is good. But good luck finding a parking spot! It's so strange! There are always more cars than people... no matter the time, even at 8 am the full station is empty and there's no parking. Those guys must be making a killing with the new parking lots. It's a shame!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUbHQ2eGlBRRAB
